services: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
query_info.aws_cli_command:
aws ce get-cost-and-usage \
  --time-period Start=2025-03-13,End=2026-03-13 \
  --granularity DAILY \
  --filter '{"And":[{"Dimensions":{"Key":"REGION","Values":["us-east-1"]}},{"Dimensions":{"Key":"SERVICE","Values":["Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka","EC2 - Other","AWS Certificate Manager"]}}]}' \
  --metrics UNBLENDED_COST BLENDED_COST AMORTIZED_COST NET_AMORTIZED_COST NET_UNBLENDED_COST \
  --group-by Type=DIMENSION,Key=SERVICE Type=DIMENSION,Key=USAGE_TYPE
query_info.aggregation_note: KCP aggregates daily results by summing costs per usage type over the selected time range and computing average/min/max statistics. The raw AWS output shows individual daily line items.
Uses SEARCH to find BytesOutPerSec across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM(m_bytesoutpersec).
Uses SEARCH to find MessagesInPerSec across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM(m_messagesinpersec).
Uses SEARCH to find PartitionCount across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM(m_partitioncount).
Uses SEARCH to find BytesInPerSec across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM(m_bytesinpersec).

query_info.dimensions: Cluster Name, Broker ID, Client Authentication
query_info.search_expression: SEARCH('{AWS/Kafka,"Cluster Name","Broker ID","Client Authentication"} MetricName="ClientConnectionCount" "Cluster Name"="kcp-playground"', 'Maximum', 86400)
query_info.aggregation_note: Uses SEARCH to find ClientConnectionCount (Maximum) across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, Client Authentication, then aggregates with SUM(max_all).

query_info.dimensions: Cluster Name, Broker ID, Client Authentication
query_info.search_expression: SEARCH('{AWS/Kafka,"Cluster Name","Broker ID","Client Authentication"} MetricName="ClientConnectionCount" "Cluster Name"="kcp-playground"', 'Average', 86400)
query_info.aggregation_note: Uses SEARCH to find ClientConnectionCount (Average) across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, Client Authentication, then aggregates with SUM(avg_all).
This metric is queried directly using MetricStat (not a SEARCH expression). It reports the cluster-level global partition count.
Uses SEARCH to find TotalLocalStorageUsage(GB) across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM(((m_local_disk / 100) * 300)).
Uses SEARCH to find TotalRemoteStorageUsage(GB) across all Cluster Name, Broker ID, then aggregates with SUM((m_remote / 1073741824)).
Uses SEARCH to find BytesInPerSec across all Cluster Name, Topic, then aggregates with SUM(m_bytesinpersec).
Uses SEARCH to find BytesOutPerSec across all Cluster Name, Topic, then aggregates with SUM(m_bytesoutpersec).
Uses SEARCH to find MessagesInPerSec across all Cluster Name, Topic, then aggregates with SUM(m_messagesinpersec).
